findings.recommendation: Apply 'rules not stories' principle: (1) extract completion report template to docs/dev/templates/completion-report.md, replacing inline 84-line block with a required-fields list (-84 lines); (2) remove Example End-to-End Workflow section (-41 lines); (3) collapse Agent Development Use Cases example blocks into 1-2 sentence summaries (-30 lines); (4) replace Orchestrator Prompt Purity incident narrative with a single-sentence origin comment (-16 lines); (5) delete Philosophy intro line (13-15) and Success Metrics checklist (1436-1444) (-12 lines). Target reduction: ~183 lines (15.4% -> ~3%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631) reduced 113 lines (-22%) by removing similar verbose sections.

verbose_sections.note: Summary section repeating Phase 6 content. Below 50-line threshold; advisory only per codex finding #11 (OBSERVATION_ONLY).

advisory_only.recommendation: Advisory: merge 'Commit message constraints (summary)' into Phase 6 or drop the duplicate summary section. Below minimum threshold for a formal finding.

no_findings.reason: All sections are operational rules. No verbose section patterns detected.

summary.estimated_reduction: ~180 lines (-12%) if all recommendations applied to commands/dev.md

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex identified 11 issues: 1 severity mis-classification (critical vs major), 1 threshold wording inconsistency, 3 false positives (lines 46-68 orchestration rules, Quality Standards Enforcement responsibility matrix, commit.md privilege guard note), 5 missed verbose sections (completion report template, Orchestrator Purity narrative, philosophy intro, Success Metrics, line range correction for /clean), and 1 observation-only (changelog-analyst summary).

findings.issue: Severity mis-classification: ~232 verbose lines should be critical (>= 200) not major
findings.proposed_fix: Change severity to critical after recomputing exact verbose lines
findings.rationale: Recomputed verbose lines post false-positive removal and missed-section additions yields 231 lines, which is >= 200 threshold. Severity corrected to critical.

findings.issue: Threshold wording internally inconsistent: minor OR pct < 15% would classify tiny findings as minor
findings.proposed_fix: Use: if verbose_lines < 50: no finding; elif >= 200 or >= 30%: critical; elif >= 100 or >= 15%: major; else: minor
findings.rationale: Adopted the cleaner threshold logic in all severity assignments.

findings.issue: False positive: commands/dev.md:46-68 Key Principles, Orchestrator Dispatch Model, Per-Subagent Single-Task Rule are mandatory execution rules
findings.proposed_fix: Only count lines 21-44 (diagram framing) as verbose; retain 46-68 as rules
findings.rationale: Lines 46-68 are non-negotiable dispatch rules (MANDATORY label, explicit prohibitions). These are execution rules, not explanatory framing. Removed from verbose count.

findings.issue: Overbroad false positive: Agent Development Use Cases 1261-1391 not entirely verbose; scope/permission/todo-requirement sub-sections are procedural
findings.rationale: Adopted narrowed scope. 49-line scope/support-type decision rules, 18-line permissions table, and 6-line todo-script requirement are execution rules, not verbose framing.

findings.issue: False positive: Quality Standards Enforcement (1238-1258) is a responsibility matrix, not mere explanation
findings.rationale: The section defines what each role enforces — this is a role-boundary contract relevant to orchestrator behavior. Removed from verbose count.

findings.issue: Missed verbosity: 84-line completion report template (1080-1163) exceeds >30-line template warning
findings.proposed_fix: Add as verbose section; extract template to docs/dev/templates/
findings.rationale: 84-line inline Markdown template is a clear verbosity violation per detection rules. Added to verbose sections.

findings.issue: Missed verbosity: Orchestrator Prompt Purity incident narrative (1453-1457) and examples (1477-1487)
findings.proposed_fix: Keep rule (1459-1475) and scope/enforcement; replace narrative/examples with one-line summary
findings.rationale: The rule itself is substantive but the origin story paragraph and worked examples are verbose prose. Added 16 lines to verbose count.

findings.issue: Missed verbosity: Philosophy intro (13-15) and Success Metrics (1436-1444) are framing
findings.proposed_fix: Delete lines 13-15; replace Success Metrics with postcondition reference
findings.rationale: Philosophy one-liner and Success Metrics checklist are decorative framing not needed for execution. Added 12 lines to verbose count.

findings.issue: Integration with /clean line range wrong in draft (1238-1259 was already used for Quality Standards)
findings.rationale: Corrected line range in verbose_sections entry.

findings.issue: False positive: commands/commit.md:256-276 privilege guard note is substantive security procedure
findings.rationale: The section documents authorization flow details needed for operators to understand the security model. This is security-relevant procedural content, not explanatory fluff.

findings.issue: OBSERVATION_ONLY: agents/changelog-analyst.md:547-561 is advisory duplicate below threshold
findings.rationale: Below 50-line threshold. Retained as advisory_only entry in report, not a formal finding.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied all 10 PROPOSED_FIX items: severity corrected to critical, 3 false positives removed from verbose count, 3 missed verbose sections added (completion template 84 lines, Purity narrative 16 lines, framing 12 lines), line range corrected, commit.md finding dropped, threshold logic clarified. Net verbose line count: 231 (critical).
